tldr_zh: AI工業應用突破、OpenAI美國股權談判、Google罰款確定等大事件聚集
tldr_en: Major developments in AI industrial applications, OpenAI's US equity discussions, and Google's antitrust fine confirmed

items.title_zh: Meta CEO坦言AI代理進度未如預期
items.title_en: Mark Zuckerberg admits AI agents haven't progressed as quickly as hoped
items.summary_zh: Meta CEO馬克·祖克柏在內部會議中承認，AI發展工作進度不如預期，特別是在AI代理技術方面。這反映出儘管科技巨頭在AI領域投入巨資，但突破性進展仍面臨挑戰。
items.summary_en: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg told staff that AI agent development has not moved as quickly as anticipated. This highlights challenges in breakthrough progress despite massive investments in AI technology by major tech companies.

items.title_zh: AI在工業應用中成為核心運營層
items.title_en: AI becoming core operating layer in industrial infrastructure
items.summary_zh: MIT科技評論報導指出，AI在涉及物理基礎設施、營運持續性和安全性的產業中正成為核心運營層。相比消費級應用，工業級AI在風力發電、電網管理等領域的實際應用影響更為深遠。
items.summary_en: MIT Technology Review reports AI is becoming a core operating layer in industries where physical infrastructure and operational safety are paramount. Industrial AI applications in areas like wind power management have far-reaching consequences beyond consumer-facing tools.

items.title_zh: OpenAI向美國提供5%股權，遠低於預期
items.title_en: OpenAI offers US 5% stake, far lower than Sanders' target
items.summary_zh: 據報導，OpenAI與川普政府就美國政府的股權比例進行談判，最終提議5%股權，遠低於參議員桑德斯建議的目標。CEO山姆·阿爾特曼正與政府積極溝通，討論AI監管和政策問題。
items.summary_en: OpenAI has offered the US government a 5% stake in negotiations with the Trump administration, significantly lower than Senator Sanders' proposed target. CEO Sam Altman is in active talks with the administration on AI policy.

items.title_zh: Google敗訴歐盟罰款案，將支付47億美元
items.title_en: Google loses EU appeal, must pay $4.7 billion fine
items.summary_zh: Google歷時數年的歐盟罰款上訴最終敗訴，需支付47億美元。該罰款涉及Google將搜索引擎與瀏覽器捆綁Android系統的反壟斷行為，這是歐盟對科技巨頭執行競爭政策的重要案例。
items.summary_en: Google's long-running appeal of an EU antitrust fine has failed, requiring the company to pay $4.7 billion. The fine addresses bundling practices of Google Search with Android, representing a significant enforcement of competition policy.

items.title_zh: 特斯拉Q2交車量同比增長25%
items.summary_zh: 特斯拉公布第二季度交車報告，共交付451,758輛車，同比增長25%，遠超華爾街預期。這標誌著特斯拉開始從2025年的銷售困境中復甦，有望終結連續兩年的銷售下滑。
items.summary_en: Tesla reported Q2 deliveries of 451,758 vehicles, a 25% increase surpassing Wall Street expectations. The strong performance marks a recovery from 2025's sales slump and suggests the company may end a two-year sales decline.

items.title_en: Meta launches AI app Pocket for generating interactive mini-games
items.summary_zh: Meta發布新應用Pocket，用戶可通過文字提示生成並分享互動式小遊戲。該應用展現Meta在AI創意工具領域的探索，試圖開拓新的用戶互動模式。
items.summary_en: Meta quietly launched Pocket, an experimental app allowing users to generate and share interactive mini-games using text prompts. The app represents Meta's exploration of AI-powered creative tools for user engagement.

items.title_zh: 特斯拉FSD案司機面臨過失殺人罪
items.title_en: Tesla FSD driver charged with manslaughter in fatal Texas crash
items.summary_zh: 德州一名特斯拉司機因駕駛配置全自動駕駛功能的車輛衝入住宅，造成一名女性死亡，現已被控過失殺人罪。該案件引發對特斯拉FSD系統安全性的關注。
items.summary_en: A Texas driver operating Tesla's Full Self Driving feature is facing manslaughter charges after his Model 3 crashed into a home, killing a woman inside. The case raises serious questions about FSD safety.

items.title_en: Cloudflare launches Monetization Gateway for AI-driven transactions
items.summary_zh: Cloudflare公開推出Monetization Gateway服務，允許用戶對受保護的網頁、數據集、API設定收費規則。該服務採用x402協議和穩定幣結算，目標是讓AI代理能按單次請求付費獲取資源。
items.summary_en: Cloudflare unveiled Monetization Gateway, enabling users to set pricing for protected web pages, datasets, and APIs. The service uses x402 protocol and stablecoins, targeting per-request payments for AI agents and automation.

items.title_zh: Virginia州禁止地理位置數據銷售
items.title_en: Virginia bans sale of geolocation data
items.summary_zh: Virginia州通過立法禁止販售地理位置數據，成為美國在隱私保護方面的重要舉措。此舉將限制數據經紀人收集和販售消費者位置信息的能力。
items.summary_en: Virginia enacted legislation banning the sale of geolocation data, a significant privacy protection measure. The law restricts data brokers from collecting and selling consumer location information.

items.title_zh: 委內瑞拉強震救援奇蹟，警衛受困8天後獲救
items.title_en: Venezuelan earthquake survivor miraculously rescued after 8 days trapped under rubble
items.summary_zh: 委內瑞拉因強震造成建築物倒塌，搜救隊經過8天的搜救工作，成功救出被困在停車場下的警衛吉爾。這個生命奇蹟鼓舞了受災民眾的士氣。
items.summary_en: Rescue teams in Venezuela successfully pulled out a security guard after 8 days trapped under a collapsed building from a recent earthquake. The miraculous rescue has boosted morale in the affected region.

items.title_zh: 俄羅斯對基輔發動歷年最猛攻擊，至少25死
items.title_en: Russia's most massive attack on Kyiv kills at least 25 people
items.summary_zh: 俄羅斯凌晨朝烏克蘭首都基輔發射數百架無人機與數十枚飛彈，造成至少25人死亡、逾90人受傷，毀損約130棟建築。這是今年對基輔最致命的攻擊行動。
items.summary_en: Russia launched its most massive attack on Kyiv in the early hours, deploying hundreds of drones and dozens of missiles, killing at least 25 people and injuring over 90. The attack damaged around 130 buildings in the widest area strike this year.

items.title_zh: 民主剛果伊波拉疫情死亡超400人
items.title_en: DRC Ebola outbreak death toll exceeds 400
items.summary_zh: 民主剛果伊波拉疫情造成超過400人死亡，東北部大城吉桑干尼傳出首例確診。WHO正在該國進行新治療藥物試驗，以控制疫情蔓延。
items.summary_en: The Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo has killed over 400 people, with the first confirmed case now reported in northeastern city of Kisangani. WHO has begun testing new treatments to control the spread.
